en.title: High schoolers' essay
en.prompt:
Please write a narrative essay of about 800 words. The essay should have an introduction, three distinct sections, and a conclusion. Each section should focus on a single event related to the main theme, which should be present throughout the essay. 

1. For the first section, focus on detailed descriptions of a specific skill or technique, including its artistic beauty and the joy of trying it for the first time.
2. In the second section, describe an innovative idea or concept, including details of its implementation and the deeper insights gained from the innovation.
3. The third section should revolve around a deeper aspect, such as cultural heritage, self-worth, or responsibility.

Before starting the essay, please share your interpretation of the title, including its surface and deeper meanings, and how they can be related to specific events or objects. Then, provide an outline of the essay, including the introduction, the main points and events for each of the three sections, and the conclusion.The title of the essay is [XXX], and the material is [YYY].
en.remark: The article produced by this prompt reflects the writing style of Chinese middle school students. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

related.title: Four-layered Structure Induction
related.remark: Multi-level summarization and induction can be used to explain words and phrases and make associations with the article. The Chinese version of this prompt has better effect. Contributed by @ergf991.

metaDescription: Writing an essay? Create a structured narrative with 3 sections. Focus on skills, innovation, and deeper values like HS standards.

faq.q: Can AI-written middle school essays score high?
faq.a: Structure meets rubric standards (3 levels, explicit and implicit themes, tying back to theme) and can score upper-middle, but graders easily spot AI tells (too polished, missing personal fingerprints), which gets marks deducted. Use it as an outline; the actual examples must come from your own experience.

faq.q: Is the depth of the AI's interpretation sufficient?
faq.a: It digs into standard depths (cultural inheritance, self-worth, responsibility) but falls into stock phrases easily. Append "avoid exam cliches like 'carry forward tradition' or 'bravely take on responsibility,' express through specific details." That breaks free from the template.
